title: ZANGOC Fizzy Cola Bottles - 500g Bulk Bag - Assorted Pick and Mix Sweets Perfect for Weddings, Birthday,and Anniversaries Gifts Treats for Get Well - Hard Candies Retro Sweets
features: Fizzy & Fun Flavours: Choose from the tangy bubblegum, refreshing cola, or an exciting assortment of both fizzy cola bottles flavours in every bottle-shaped treat.
Perfect for Sharing: The 500g bulk bag is perfect for parties, pick-and-mix candy stations, or sharing with friends and family.
Great for Pick & Mix: Add a fizzy twist to your candy selection with a variety of flavours that will delight any candy lover.
Gift-Ready: An ideal gift for sweet-toothed friends and family, or as a fun treat for any occasion.
Premium Quality by ZANGOC: Made with high-quality ingredients to deliver irresistible taste and fizzy fun in every bite.
Vibrant & Colourful: The playful, colourful bottles will add fun and excitement to your candy collection or event.
description: Product description Indulge in the fizzy, fruity fun of ZANGOC Fizzy cola bottles Sweets! Available in three irresistible variations — Fizzy Bubblegum Bottles, Fizzy Cola Bottles, and an Assorted mix of both — these colourful, bottle-shaped sweets offer a tangy, fizzy experience that’s perfect for any occasion. Whether you're hosting a party, creating a pick-and-mix candy selection, or looking for a fun gift, these 500g bulk bags deliver the perfect combination of flavour and fizz. With premium quality ingredients and vibrant colours, ZANGOC’s Fizzy Bottles Sweets are sure to please candy lovers of all ages. Treat yourself, share with friends, or give as a gift — no matter the occasion, these fizzy delights are a must-have! Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Water, Gelatine (Pork), Acids (Lactic Acid, Malic Acid, Citric Acid), Acidity Regulators (Sodium Malates, Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate), Flavouring, Vegetable Concentrate (Black Carrot), Colour (E133). Directions Consume directly from the package. No specific serving size or age suitability mentioned. See more
